SEARCH
Package minicp.engine.constraints

Class DisjunctiveBinary

java.lang.Object
minicp.engine.core.AbstractConstraint
minicp.engine.constraints.DisjunctiveBinary
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<DisjunctiveBinary>, Constraint
public class DisjunctiveBinary extends AbstractConstraint implements Comparable<DisjunctiveBinary>
Constraint enforcing that two activities cannot overlap in time The implementation of this constraint uses reified constraints.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors

    Description
    DisjunctiveBinary(IntVar start1, int duration1, IntVar start2, int duration2)
    Constraint enforcing that two activities cannot overlap

      duration1 - duration of activity 1
